summary: Iteration 46: Weather V2 Incremental Upgrade - All features verified working. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified via Playwright.

sample_rejected_explanation.market: Will the highest temperature in Atlanta be 37°F or below on March 17?

best_signal_this_scan.thesis: Model says 37°F or below has 25% probability but market prices it at 1%; 2424bps edge; forecast (39F) is within -0.9 sigma of bucket center

weather_position_breakdown.by_resolution_date: Grouped by date with count, capital, unrealized_pnl

test_credentials: None required - paper mode, no auth
seed_data_creation: None - tested with live MongoDB data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 46 Weather V2 upgrade complete: (1) Explanation layer added to all weather signals - includes forecast_summary, model_probability, market_price, edge, confidence, rejection_reason (for rejected), thesis (for tradable). (2) quality_score computed on every signal (0-1 scale combining edge 50%, confidence 30%, liquidity 20%). (3) best_signal_this_scan tracked in /api/strategies/weather/health showing top opportunity per scan. (4) /api/positions/weather/breakdown endpoint returns age/resolution analysis: total_open, total_unrealized_pnl, by_resolution_date grouping, biggest_winners, biggest_losers, oldest_open, stale_positions. Frontend updated with BEST SIGNAL banner on Signals tab, Quality/Thesis columns in signals table, color-coded rejection reasons in Rejected tab, Context column with forecast summary, PositionBreakdownSection on Open Positions tab. All existing functionality preserved. Weather thresholds: min_edge=500bps, min_confidence=0.55, max_weather_positions=25. Currently 54 open weather positions (over cap, so no new trades execute but signals still generate).
